reviews.review_title: Looks amazing but can be frustrating
reviews.review_description: This game is incredibly beautiful, and the core premise is really smart. It would definitely benefit from a clearer tutorial, as the gameplay is extremely abstract - I had no idea what I was doing, but still managed to complete half of the puzzles with random fiddling.
This is such a beautiful and well crafted piece. Absolutely stunning visuals and a great use for VR. Reminds me of the mobile app Monument Valley, except now you're IN the experience. A MUST HAVE.

developer_response.body: thanks for the feedback, and thank you for playing Claro! can you please email us at info@superbright.org and let's see what the problem was, maybe we can help?

reviews.review_description: This is the first time I have felt moved to write a review here.  This is a work of art as much as it is a "game": truly a beautiful, relaxing experience.   The execution is impeccable and the love with which the app was developed is evident.  Bravo!
Amazing game to show off the capabilities of the oculus go. Love it .... more please

reviews.review_title: Spin your controller until it works
reviews.review_description:
The game boils down to randomly moving your controller until you somehow solve the puzzle by accident. I encountered several hitches and frame drops. 
Some of the puzzles are right in your face and you can't see the whole puzzle properly. I also had a stage where the snowball refuses to melt.
The light rays feel finicky to aim since they snap to certain angles. There are a decent amount of stages (around 35+) and I got stuck on a few of them.
The game looks nice but it's anything but relaxing when you get stuck.

Beautiful environment and relaxing gameplay - it took a while to solve all levels as aiming the beams of light could sometimes be finnicky. I've been stuck at level 7/5 with the ball covered in snow - nothing I do seems to have the chance of melting it - any help? Update! Half an hour after posting this review, I managed to melt the snow - seems so obvious now :-)
Just bought for my s9+ but won't let me download. Just says fail.

developer_response.body: Hi Matt, apologies but Claro is Go only and it shouldn't have been possible to purchase it on a S9.  Please email us at info@superbright.org

reviews.review_description: I was thinking about how they made this game for VR... It's original and creative, lots of fun!
Why aren't all game graphics that crisp? Amazing. It seems that this game is the first that uses the full potential of the Oculus Go. I hope that you earn enough money to make more games like this.
Nice , easy and beautiful an inspiring example of VR creativity
a very beautiful meditative game, enjoy stunning graphics, a great vacation!

reviews.review_title: Love it but cannot play - here's why
reviews.review_description: The game is beautifully designed, the idea, the sounds, the challenge. However it's so difficult to achieve the right direction of sunlight with 3 differently positioned "beamers" that I was not even able to complete the second tutorial set. Too difficult, sorry... I tried many times and finally I had to give up. You should add hints and helps in case someone gets stuck, in order to enjoy the game.
I like this puzzle game. But need more levels. Please :)

I don't know if it gets more interesting in higher levels, but so far I have to agree with the person that said you basically just move your controller around until you randomly solve the puzzle. I have to admit I regret having spent the money.
Very cool game, amazing graphics that definitely show off the go. I found it to be a little redundant after the third puzzle but that’s just me
